title: Graph rules: coverage, reference-integrity, dependency-shape
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 4.2.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] label-coverage: every source label is satisfied by >=1 child in a configurable state.
- [hard] label-reference: a from-label resolves to a declared label within a configurable scope.
- [hard] dependency-shape: a selector must/should depend on a target selector; runs only in validate/gate checkers.
